G06N.title: Computing arrangements based on specific computational models

subcategories.G06N3: Biological models — neural networks, deep learning, connectionist systems
subcategories.G06N5: Knowledge-based models — expert systems, ontologies, rule engines
subcategories.G06N7: Mathematical models — Bayesian networks, Markov models, probabilistic graphical models
subcategories.G06N10: Quantum computing — quantum circuits, quantum error correction
subcategories.G06N20: Machine learning — ensemble methods, transfer learning, reinforcement learning, general ML

G06N.domain_hint: AI/ML — novelty typically in architecture design, training methodology, loss function, or application-specific adaptation rather than in the general concept of using ML

G06F.title: Electric digital data processing

subcategories.G06F3: Input/output arrangements — HCI, display, interaction devices
subcategories.G06F8: Software engineering — compilers, interpreters, program analysis
subcategories.G06F9: Arrangements for program control — operating systems, scheduling, virtualization
subcategories.G06F16: Information retrieval, database structures — search, indexing, query processing
subcategories.G06F18: Pattern recognition — classification, clustering, feature extraction
subcategories.G06F21: Security — authentication, access control, tamper detection

G06F.domain_hint: Systems/software — novelty in system architecture, data structures, algorithms, or specific optimizations. Generic use of known techniques on new data is weak

G06T.title: Image data processing or generation

subcategories.G06T1: General image data processing — pipelines, architectures
subcategories.G06T3: Geometric image transformation — warping, registration, super-resolution
subcategories.G06T7: Image analysis — segmentation, edge detection, motion estimation
subcategories.G06T11: 2D image generation — rendering, synthesis, style transfer
subcategories.G06T15: 3D image rendering — ray tracing, rasterization, volumetric rendering
subcategories.G06T17: 3D modelling — mesh, point cloud, implicit representations (NeRF, SDF)

G06T.domain_hint: Computer vision/graphics — novelty in representation, loss design, architecture for specific visual tasks. Cross-check medical imaging (A61B) and autonomous driving (B60W)

G06V.title: Image or video recognition or understanding

subcategories.G06V10: Arrangements for image/video recognition — feature extraction, matching
subcategories.G06V20: Scenes or specific objects — face recognition, OCR, scene understanding

G06V.domain_hint: Visual recognition — novelty in detection/recognition architectures, training data strategies, or domain-specific adaptations. Generic detector on new dataset is weak

G06Q.title: Data processing systems for administrative, commercial, financial purposes

subcategories.G06Q20: Payment — electronic payment, digital currency, transaction processing
subcategories.G06Q40: Finance — trading, risk assessment, insurance, banking
subcategories.G06Q50: Systems for specific business sectors — healthcare admin, education, agriculture

G06Q.domain_hint: Business methods — Alice/Mayo eligibility is a major hurdle. Novelty must be in technical implementation, not abstract business concept

H04L.title: Transmission of digital information

subcategories.H04L9: Cryptography — encryption, key exchange, digital signatures, blockchain
subcategories.H04L12: Data switching networks — routing, switching, network architecture
subcategories.H04L41: Network management — configuration, monitoring, fault detection
subcategories.H04L67: Network protocols — HTTP, DNS, streaming, peer-to-peer

H04L.domain_hint: Networking/communications — novelty in protocol design, resource allocation algorithms, or security mechanisms. Standards-essential patents (SEP) have special considerations

H04W.title: Wireless communication networks

subcategories.H04W12: Security — authentication, integrity, privacy in wireless
subcategories.H04W52: Power management — energy saving, power control
subcategories.H04W72: Resource management — scheduling, channel assignment, MIMO
subcategories.H04W84: Network topologies — mesh, ad-hoc, sensor networks

H04W.domain_hint: Wireless/5G/6G — heavily patented by telecom companies. Cross-check 3GPP standards. Novelty often in PHY layer techniques, MAC scheduling, or beam management

H04N.title: Pictorial communication (television)

subcategories.H04N21: Selective content distribution — streaming, DRM, interactive TV
subcategories.H04N23: Cameras — image sensors, camera modules, computational photography
subcategories.H04N25: Solid-state image sensors — CMOS, CCD, pixel architectures

H04N.domain_hint: Video/imaging systems — codec patents are SEP-heavy. Novelty in compression algorithm, sensor architecture, or streaming protocol

A61B.title: Diagnosis; Surgery; Identification

subcategories.A61B5: Diagnostic measurement — biosensors, physiological monitoring, wearables
subcategories.A61B6: Radiation diagnosis — X-ray, CT, imaging systems
subcategories.A61B17: Surgical instruments — minimally invasive, robotic surgery
subcategories.A61B34: Computer-aided surgery — surgical navigation, robotic assistance

A61B.domain_hint: Medical devices — FDA regulatory path matters. Novelty in device design, signal processing, or AI-assisted diagnosis. Cross-check G16H for health informatics

A61K.title: Preparations for medical, dental, or toilet purposes

subcategories.A61K9: Medicinal preparations — dosage forms, drug delivery systems
subcategories.A61K31: Organic active ingredients — small molecules, pharmaceuticals
subcategories.A61K35: Medicinal preparations containing materials from animals/microorganisms
subcategories.A61K48: Gene therapy — gene editing, gene delivery vectors

A61K.domain_hint: Pharma/biotech — Markush structures, genus/species claims. Novelty in formulation, mechanism of action, or specific compound. Enablement and written description are critical

B25J.title: Manipulators; Chambers provided with manipulation devices

subcategories.B25J9: Programme-controlled manipulators — robot arms, motion planning
subcategories.B25J13: Human-robot interaction — force feedback, collaborative robots
subcategories.B25J15: Gripping heads — end effectors, grippers, suction
subcategories.B25J19: Safety devices — collision avoidance, force limiting

B25J.domain_hint: Robotics — novelty in mechanical design, control algorithms, planning methods, or sensor fusion. Cross-check computer vision (G06T/V) for perception

C12N.title: Microorganisms or enzymes; Compositions thereof

subcategories.C12N5: Undifferentiated human/animal cells — cell culture, stem cells
subcategories.C12N15: Mutation/genetic engineering — vectors, CRISPR, gene expression systems

C12N.domain_hint: Biotechnology — sequence listings, deposit requirements. Novelty in engineered organisms, gene editing targets, or expression systems

G01N.title: Investigating or analysing materials

subcategories.G01N33: Specific analysis — immunoassays, clinical chemistry, environmental testing

G01N.domain_hint: Analytical instruments/sensors — novelty in sensing mechanism, signal processing, or assay design. Sensitivity/specificity improvements must be quantified

G01S.title: Radio direction-finding; Navigation; Measuring distance/velocity

subcategories.G01S5: Position fixing — GPS, trilateration, indoor positioning
subcategories.G01S7: Radar/lidar details — signal processing, antenna systems
subcategories.G01S13: Radar systems — SAR, FMCW, phased array

G01S.domain_hint: Radar/lidar/positioning — heavily relevant to autonomous driving and defense. Novelty in signal processing, waveform design, or sensor fusion

G02B.title: Optical elements, systems, or apparatus

subcategories.G02B5: Optical elements — lenses, prisms, diffraction gratings, metasurfaces
subcategories.G02B6: Light guides — optical fibers, waveguides, photonic crystals
subcategories.G02B27: Optical systems — holographic displays, AR/VR optics, projection

G02B.domain_hint: Optics/photonics — novelty in optical design, material properties, or system integration. AR/VR optics is a hot filing area

G05B.title: Control or regulating systems; Functional elements

subcategories.G05B13: Adaptive control — model predictive control, fuzzy logic, neural control
subcategories.G05B19: Programme control — CNC, PLC, industrial automation

G05B.domain_hint: Control systems — novelty in control algorithm, system architecture, or real-time optimization. Cross-check robotics (B25J) and ML (G06N)

G05D.title: Control of non-electric variables

subcategories.G05D1: Control of position/course/altitude — autonomous navigation, path planning, SLAM

G05D.domain_hint: Autonomous systems navigation — SLAM, path planning, obstacle avoidance. Cross-check robotics and autonomous driving

G10L.title: Speech analysis or synthesis; Speech recognition

subcategories.G10L13: Speech synthesis — TTS, voice conversion, prosody
subcategories.G10L15: Speech recognition — ASR, keyword spotting, language models
subcategories.G10L21: Speech processing — enhancement, separation, noise reduction

G10L.domain_hint: Speech/audio — novelty in model architecture, training procedure, or acoustic feature design. LLM-based approaches cross into G06N

G16H.title: Healthcare informatics

subcategories.G16H10: ICT for diagnosis — clinical decision support, AI-assisted diagnosis
subcategories.G16H20: ICT for therapies — treatment planning, dosage optimization
subcategories.G16H30: ICT for medical images — PACS, image analysis, radiomics
subcategories.G16H40: ICT for management — EHR, hospital information systems
subcategories.G16H50: ICT for medical prognosis — predictive models, risk scoring

G16H.domain_hint: Health informatics — regulatory (FDA SaMD) matters. Novelty in clinical workflow integration, specific medical AI models, or data pipeline design

G16B.title: Bioinformatics

subcategories.G16B15: Structure prediction — protein folding, molecular dynamics
subcategories.G16B20: Sequence analysis — alignment, variant calling, phylogenetics
subcategories.G16B40: Drug design — virtual screening, QSAR, generative chemistry

G16B.domain_hint: Bioinformatics/computational biology — novelty in algorithm for biological data, not just applying ML to bio data. AlphaFold-type structural prediction is heavily filed

H01L.title: Semiconductor devices; Electric solid state devices

subcategories.H01L21: Processes or apparatus for manufacture — lithography, etching, deposition
subcategories.H01L23: Packaging — chip packaging, interconnects, thermal management
subcategories.H01L27: Devices consisting of a plurality of individual semiconductor components — memory arrays, image sensors

H01L.domain_hint: Semiconductors — process patents are extremely valuable. Novelty in device structure, material, or manufacturing process

H02J.title: Circuit arrangements for electric power supply or distribution

subcategories.H02J3: AC distribution networks — smart grid, power quality, renewable integration
subcategories.H02J7: Charging/battery management — EV charging, wireless charging, BMS

H02J.domain_hint: Power systems — smart grid, EV charging, energy storage. Novelty in power conversion topology, control strategy, or grid integration

B60W.title: Conjoint control of vehicle sub-units of different type or different function

subcategories.B60W30: Vehicle control for specific purposes — autonomous driving, ADAS, platooning
subcategories.B60W40: Estimation or calculation of non-directly measurable driving parameters — state estimation
subcategories.B60W50: Details of control systems — safety, fail-safe, driver override
subcategories.B60W60: Drive control systems for autonomous road vehicles — planning, decision-making

B60W.domain_hint: Autonomous driving — perception/planning/control stack. Cross-check lidar (G01S), vision (G06V), and navigation (G05D)

F24F.title: Air-conditioning; Air-humidification; Ventilation

subcategories.F24F1: Room units — indoor units, split systems
subcategories.F24F5: Specialised systems — clean rooms, data center cooling
subcategories.F24F11: Control — HVAC controls, smart thermostats, building automation

F24F.domain_hint: HVAC — novelty in system design, control algorithm, or energy efficiency. IoT/smart building integration is growing

C07K.title: Peptides

subcategories.C07K14: Peptides from specific organisms — structural proteins, antigens, receptors
subcategories.C07K16: Immunoglobulins — monoclonal antibodies, antibody engineering, bispecifics

C07K.domain_hint: Protein/antibody engineering — sequence-based claims, CDR definitions. Novelty in binding specificity, engineering strategy, or therapeutic application
